Big_house.description: Rooms feature natural wood design and include a dressing table and heated floors in the halls and bathrooms.

Club_house.description: The rooms have a flat.screen TV with cable channels.

Huge_house.description: Each room features a balcony and mountain as well as pool views.

Squirrel Hole.description: Apartments in wooden style where you feel like living in a home of squirrel

Space for Lovers.description: Apartment has one big room with one king-size bed.

Welcome Home Apartments.description: Two separate rooms with one common bath and kitchen

Pershi Pivni.description: Two stores small house with two rooms, one balcony in each
